heading_help: 𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝘄𝗼𝘂𝗹𝗱 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗹𝗶𝗸𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝗱𝗼?
admin_required: ⚠️ Let me invite users, then try again.
play_unban_required: ⚠️ All music assistants are banned or restricted in this group. Unban them manually, or give me Ban Users permission so I can restore them, then try again.
admin_cache_wait: You can only refresh the admin cache once every 10 minutes.
auth_empty: ℹ️ No extra users have playback access.
auth_is_admin: ℹ️ Admins already have playback access.
auto_left: 👋 I left because the video chat was quiet.
bl_invalid: Only chat IDs and user IDs are supported.
bl_removed: This chat has been removed from the blacklist.
bl_user_notify: You've been blacklisted from using this bot. Please reach out in the support chat for more info.

dl_cancelling: Hang on, cancelling the download now!
dl_active: ℹ️ That file is already downloading. Please wait for it to finish.
dl_limit: That file is larger than the 200 MB limit. Please choose a smaller file.
error_no_audio: ⚠️ That file has no playable audio. Trying the next track.
error_no_call: ⚠️ Start a video chat, then try again.
error_no_file: ⚠️ I couldn't prepare that track. Try another one or visit support.
error_tg_server: ⚠️ Telegram interrupted playback. Please try again.
error_rtmp: This kind of live stream can't be played here. Start a regular video chat, then try again.
feedback_error_user: ⚠️ That didn't work. Try again in a moment. {0}
gcast_usage: Reply to the message you want to broadcast, then send /broadcast. Optional flags: -user, -nochat, -copy.
gcast_active: ℹ️ A broadcast is already running. Wait for its summary before starting another.
gcast_start: ⏳ Broadcast started. A delivery summary will appear here when it finishes.
gcast_end: Broadcasted the message to {0} groups and {1} users.
help_menu: 🎵 𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝘄𝗼𝘂𝗹𝗱 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗹𝗶𝗸𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝗱𝗼? Choose a section below.
help_admins: Commands in the 🛠 Controls category: /setup — Checks what the group still needs before music can play. /setup /settings — Opens this group’s playback preferences in private. /settings /pause — Pauses the current track. /pause /resume — Continues paused music or a saved queue. /resume /skip — Moves to the next track. /skip /stop — Ends playback and clears the queue. /stop /seek — Moves forward by the chosen number of seconds. /seek <seconds> /seekback — Moves backward by the chosen number of seconds. /seekback <seconds> /reload — Refreshes the group’s admin list. /reload
help_auth: Commands in the 👤 Access category: /auth — Lets a replied member control playback without making them an admin. reply with /auth /unauth — Removes playback access from a replied member. reply with /unauth /authlist — Shows everyone with extra playback access. /authlist
help_blist: Commands in the 🛡 Safety category: /blacklist — Blocks a user or group from using the bot. /blacklist <user or group ID> /unblacklist — Restores access for a blocked user or group. /unblacklist <user or group ID>
help_lang: Commands in the 🌐 Language category: /language — Chooses the language used in this group. /language
help_ping: Commands in the ✨ Bot category: /start — Opens the main menu. /start /help — Shows every command category. /help /ping — Checks whether the bot is ready. /ping
help_play: Commands in the 🎵 Music category: /play — Plays a song or YouTube link in the group call. /play <song or link> or reply with /play /vplay — Plays a music video in the group call. /vplay <song or link> or reply with /vplay /song — Downloads a song as Telegram-playable audio with its details preserved. /song <song or link>, reply with /song, or send /song -f — Places the requested track at the front of the queue. /play -f <song or link>
help_queue: Commands in the 📋 Queue category: /queue — Shows what is playing and what comes next. /queue /loop — Repeats the current track the chosen number of times. /loop <count>
help_stats: Commands in the 📊 Insights category: /stats — Shows bot reach, activity, uptime, and service health. /stats /trending — Shows the most-played tracks across the bot this month. /trending
help_sudo: Commands in the ⚙️ Sudo category: /sessions — Opens the complete assistant account manager. /sessions /addsession — Adds an assistant with a phone number or session string. /addsession /session — Shows one assistant and its current state. /session <number> /enablesession — Brings a saved assistant online. /enablesession <number> /disablesession — Takes an assistant offline without removing it. /disablesession <number> /restartsession — Reconnects an assistant cleanly. /restartsession <number> /removesession — Permanently removes an assistant. /removesession <number> /status — Shows detailed application and server health. /status /activevc — Lists groups with active music streams. /activevc /broadcast — Sends a replied message to the selected audience. reply with /broadcast [options] /logs — Sends the current application log. /logs /setlog — Chooses where detailed bot reports are sent. /setlog <group ID> /logger — Enables or disables detailed reports. /logger <on|off> /config — Opens safe settings that can change while the bot is running. /config /setconfig — Changes one safe runtime setting. /setconfig <setting> <value> /resetconfig — Restores one runtime setting to its default. /resetconfig <setting> /backupdb — Creates and sends a safe database backup. /backupdb /addsudo — Gives a replied user sudo access. reply with /addsudo /rmsudo — Removes sudo access from a replied user. reply with /rmsudo /sudolist — Shows everyone with sudo access. /sudolist /eval — Runs a Python expression for owner-level maintenance. /eval <expression> /restart — Restarts the bot process. /restart
log_not_found: ℹ️ No application log is available yet.
logger_off: ℹ️ Log delivery paused. The configured destination was kept.
logger_no_chat: No log group is configured. Run /setlog in the destination group, or use /setlog -100… first.
logger_usage: Choose whether to deliver activity logs: /{0} on /{0} off

play_duration_limit: Streams longer than {0} minutes are not allowed to play.
play_queue_full: ℹ️ The queue is full ({0} tracks). Try again after a song finishes.
play_invite_error: I couldn't bring the assistant into this chat. Make sure I can invite users, then try again.
play_peer_error: I couldn't connect the music assistant to this group. Make sure the assistant is not banned, then try again.
play_invite_pending: The music assistant asked to join, but the request is still waiting for approval. Approve it from the group's join requests, then try again.
play_not_found: I couldn't find a playable result. Try a different title or link. If this keeps happening, contact the support chat.
play_chat_invalid: This bot can only be used in supergroups. To convert your group to a supergroup, make the chat history visible once. Leaving this chat...

recovery_waiting: ℹ️ Your queue is saved but isn't playing yet. Keep the video chat running and use /resume to continue.
recovery_file_missing: Your queue was restored, but the current file is no longer available. Use /skip or add another track.
recovery_skipped: Skipped the unavailable saved track. Use /resume when you're ready to continue.
restarted: ✅ Restart requested. The bot should be back in a few seconds.
sessions_open_private: 🔐 Session controls are available in your private dashboard.
session_usage: Use /session <slot|@username|user ID>. Run /sessions to see available slots.
session_not_found: 🔎 No assistant matches that slot, username, or user ID.
session_not_allowed: 🔒 This dashboard is restricted to sudo users.
session_private_only: For safety, add session strings only in a private chat with me.
addsession_usage: Send /addsession <session string> here in private. The command containing the secret will be deleted immediately.
session_add_prompt: 🔑 Aᴅᴅ Aɴ Assɪsᴛᴀɴᴛ Reply with the session string. Your reply will be removed immediately.
session_phone_prompt: 📱 Pʜᴏɴᴇ Nᴜᴍʙᴇʀ Reply with the number in international format. Example: +959… Use /cancel to stop.
session_phone_invalid: ⚠️ That phone number doesn't look complete. Include the country code and try again.
session_code_prompt: 📩 Cʜᴇᴄᴋ Tᴇʟᴇɢʀᴀᴍ Reply with the sign-in code sent for {0}. Spaces are fine.
